testsuite.name: Network Layer Integration

testcase.name: should aggregate health status from all components
should discover and transfer blob between two nodes
should track peer events across unified network

testsuite.system-out: 15:04:47.150 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: sHIzj+eWT7H6CxaDddPD3Q==, expected response: gWAg/GEoxfQbVRfxpQKXu3a+eDY= 15:04:47.471 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.maxCapacityPerThread: 4096 15:04:47.471 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.ratio: 8 15:04:47.472 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.chunkSize: 32 15:04:47.472 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.blocking: false 15:04:47.472 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.batchFastThreadLocalOnly: true 15:04:48.806 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0x525e383d, L:/127.0.0.1:33783 - R:/127.0.0.1:44564] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 15:04:48.807 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: sHIzj+eWT7H6CxaDddPD3Q==, response: gWAg/GEoxfQbVRfxpQKXu3a+eDY= Connecting to: ws://127.0.0.1:35635 15:05:08.770 [nioEventLoopGroup-51-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: DMw4FGvXU7pooa+SqXuBNw==, expected response: /uNJtjg5TWtJNYaoHJRRY3HEadc= 15:05:08.786 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0x2400fcf9, L:/127.0.0.1:35635 - R:/127.0.0.1:32944] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 15:05:08.787 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: DMw4FGvXU7pooa+SqXuBNw==, response: /uNJtjg5TWtJNYaoHJRRY3HEadc= Connection successful
